mechanism_narrative: Persistent near-zero Fed funds rate signals accommodative monetary policy that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: If FEDFUNDS rises above 0.25% and forward returns remain positive, or if walk-forward Rank IC < 0.02 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: When CPI inflation surpasses a high threshold, the market anticipates tighter monetary policy that raises discount rates and depresses equity valuations, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: If forward returns are positive in more than 50% of triggered instances, or if the Fed does not tighten within 6 months of trigger.

mechanism_narrative: Large monthly gains in payroll employment indicate a strengthening labor market and robust economic demand, boosting earnings expectations and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: If triggered periods have negative median 20-day forward returns, or if Rank IC ≤ 0 over all triggered instances.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneously strong housing starts (demand for construction) and constrained industrial production (supply bottleneck) create input cost inflation that squeezes corporate margins and depresses equity returns over a quarter horizon.
failure_condition: If the joint condition yields positive median 60-day forward returns, or if the condition does not coincide with rising input prices (PPI).

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month decline in retail sales signals weakening consumer demand that reduces corporate revenues and earnings, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: If triggered instances produce positive median 20-day returns, or if false positive rate exceeds 60%.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate drops below the natural rate threshold, labor market tightness drives wage inflation that compresses corporate margins and triggers Fed tightening expectations, leading to negative equity returns.
failure_condition: If forward returns are positive in over 50% of triggered periods, or if wage growth does not accelerate within 3 quarters.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production signals expanding output and real economic activity, which supports earnings growth and drives positive S&P 500 returns over short weekly horizons.
evidence_refs: fact:INDPRO was 101.59 in August 2021, up 0.4% from July
failure_condition: If the rank correlation of INDPRO changes with future 5-day returns is negative over any 1-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: In a regime of very strong GDP growth (well above trend), aggregate demand drives corporate profits and stock prices higher over a 60-day horizon, but the mechanism is conditional on growth remaining above a threshold.
failure_condition: If GDP growth slows below 2% and forward returns remain positive, or if Rank IC < 0 over any 3-year rolling window.
